title: Paginate Rows with LIMIT and OFFSET in MySQL
summary: Return one stable page of rows in MySQL with ORDER BY, LIMIT, and OFFSET.
verification_setup: Ensure mysql, mysqladmin, and mysqld are available on PATH.
verification_notes: Executed from the snippet root with Python 3.9.6 and MySQL 8.4.0 on macOS. The tests start a temporary MySQL instance with local mysql binaries, then verify page size, stable ordering, tie-breaking, partial pages, and empty results.
